NAVAREA XIX 58/20


NORWEGIAN SEA

ANDOYA SPACE CENTER WILL CONDUCT AN OPERATION FROM ANDOYA IN THE PERIOD 22 -30 JUNE 2020.
THE OPERATION WILL BE CONDUCTED DAILY BETWEEN 1700-2100UTC
MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:

A. 69-07.17N 15-36.65E
B. 69-08.60N 15-38.00E
C. 69-10.50N 15-47.20E
D. 70-05.20N 14-14.50E
E. 70-00.70N 13-52.80E
F. 69-06.20N 15-26.10E
G. 69-07.50N 15-32.50E
H. 69-07.17N 15-36.65E

SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES
REFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINER NO 11.2020
